## Agent Name
<!-- e.g., ml-engineer, blockchain-specialist, data-scientist -->
`{name}-agent` or `{name}-specialist`

## Domain
<!-- What domain does this agent cover? -->


## Why Is This Agent Missing?
<!-- What tasks can't be done well with the current 20 agents? Give an example. -->


## Unique Rules This Agent Would Have
<!-- Agents are only useful if they have SPECIFIC, OPINIONATED rules. What would set this agent apart?  -->
1.
2.
3.

## Anti-Patterns This Agent Would Prevent
<!-- What mistakes does this agent stop? -->
- ❌ Never...
- ❌ Avoid...

## Routing Keywords
<!-- What phrases in a user's request would trigger this agent? -->
- "..."
- "..."

## Example Interaction
```
User: [example request this agent would handle]
Agent response approach: [how this agent would uniquely respond]
```

## Are You Submitting a PR?
- [ ] Yes, the YAML + MD are ready
- [ ] I have the YAML, need help with the MD
- [ ] Just proposing — looking for a maintainer to build it
